ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "track_album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode (major or minor) of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the track */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "track_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "track_popularity" INTEGER /* A score indicating the popularity of the track */,
  "track_isrc" TEXT /* The International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "playlist_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the playlist */,
  "playlist_subgenre" TEXT /* Subgenre of the playlist */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  "playlist_visibility" TEXT /* Indicates whether the playlist is public, private, or shared */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the playlist's cover image */,
  "playlist_play_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the playlist has been played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "track_position" INTEGER /* The position of the track in the playlist */,
  "track_added_reason" TEXT /* The reason the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, content manager, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the user */,
  "user_followers" INTEGER /* The number of followers the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_audio_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode (major or minor) of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key detection */,
  "time_signature_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the time signature detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, play, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the engagement in milliseconds */,
  "engagement_device" TEXT /* The device used for the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_engagement_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
